programme.title: Tribunal Justice
programme.desc: A married couple sues their former tenant, claiming damages exceeding $80K to their rental property; the defendant believes the damages are exaggerated to finance the couple's home renovations and countersues for the return of her security deposit.

programme.title: Tribunal Justice
programme.desc: A blind man sues his former caretaker, claiming breach of agreement for living rent-free in exchange for services.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Bobby says Victoria cheated around the time she got pregnant, has been having sex for money and has created fake social media accounts to make him look like an overzealous boyfriend; Quan wants to know for sure if Imani's daughter is really his.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: Unlock: Blocked From Grandma's Funeral; Unlock: You Broke My Heart ... Should I Break Our Lease?
programme.desc: Shannon and her cousin Sarah were inseparable until their grandmother passed away; then, Shannon says, Sarah turned the entire family against her -- but Sarah tells a different story, insisting that the family has gone above and beyond to support Shannon; Jada and Michael are struggling to move on while still living under the same roof -- Jada isn't ready to let go, and she wants Michael's phone unlocked to get the truth.

programme.title: Judy Justice
programme.desc: An American bully breeder sues a man for the remaining balance on a puppy purchased for his seven-year-old daughter.

programme.title: Judy Justice
programme.desc: A fundraising effort via t-shirt sales goes awry when a woman is dissatisfied with sample shirts and asks for a refund from a small business owner; a heated incident and a defamation countersuit follow soon after.

programme.title: Tribunal Justice
programme.desc: In a neighborhood spat, a widow sues her neighbor for unpaid loans her deceased husband provided; she sets the record straight, emphasizing the absence of any romantic involvement between them.

programme.title: Tribunal Justice
programme.desc: A man sues his ex-girlfriend for brake repair costs, doubling the amount due to perceived malice; she says they are even because she supported him during his incarceration.

programme.sub-title: Did My Boyfriend Abuse My Daughter?

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: Unlock: I Went to Jail, You Went Cheating!; Mom, I'm Not Your Online Bully!
programme.desc: While Johnathan was in jail, he says, he and his fiancée, Natasha, agreed to stay faithful, yet he suspects she hasn't kept her promise; Tamertha says she's being bullied online by her own daughter, Teesiah, and she hopes Karamo can help them repair their broken relationship.

programme.title: Judy Justice
programme.desc: The Judge rules on two cases; two Pit Bulls jump over a fence and maul a neighbor's small dog; the Judge speaks to the responsibility that comes with owning dangerous dog breeds; in the next case, a woman sues a hairstylist.

programme.desc: A dog attack on Christmas day divides neighbors who fight over which of their dogs was the aggressor and who is responsible for vet bills.
